title: Spanish Tacos
description: A flavorful and crispy taco recipe inspired by Spanish cuisine.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced olives and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the tacos seasoning and stir to combine.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the olive mixture onto a warmed tortilla.
Top with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
